intro.title: Red Flag Test
intro.subtitle: What's your biggest dating red flag?

question.0: How do you handle being left on read?
question.0a: Send 5 more messages to make sure they saw it
question.0b: Check their social media to see if they're active
question.0c: Spiral into overthinking what I did wrong
question.0d: Assume they hate me and plan for the worst
question.1: Someone you like posts a story. What do you do?
question.1a: Watch it 6 times analyzing every detail
question.1b: Debate for 20 minutes if I should react to it
question.1c: Ignore it so I don't seem desperate
question.2: Your crush is taking too long to reply. Your move?
question.2c: Feel ALL the anxiety at maximum intensity
question.2d: Convince myself they're just busy (they're not)
question.3: How do you act on a first date?
question.3a: Already planning the wedding in my head
question.3c: Barely talk because I'm overthinking everything
question.3d: Talk non-stop to fill every silence
question.4: You see your ex at a party. What happens?
question.4a: Hide in the bathroom for 30 minutes
question.4b: Pretend I didn't see them (while watching constantly)
question.4c: Make intense eye contact to assert dominance
question.4d: Be overly friendly to show how fine I am
question.5: How do you handle conflict in relationships?
question.5b: Avoid it forever and let resentment build
question.5c: Overapologize for things that aren't my fault
question.6: Someone gives you a compliment. Your reaction?
question.6b: Assume they want something from me
question.6c: Panic quietly and say nothing coherent
question.6d: Overshare why I don't deserve it
question.7: You just started dating someone new. What's your vibe?
question.7a: Already picking names for our future kids
question.7c: Stalk their entire social media history to 2015
question.7d: Just waiting for them to ghost me eventually

result.percentile: Only {pct} of all participants are the {type} type

doubleTexter.name: The Double-Texter
doubleTexter.tagline: Sends 12 follow-up messages before getting a reply
doubleTexter.description: You're the person who cannot handle the anxiety of waiting. One unanswered text turns into five 'hey's, three 'you there?'s, and a 'sorry if I'm bothering you.' Your phone is basically a weapon of mass communication. You know it's a red flag, but your fingers move faster than your self-control.

profileStalker.name: The Profile Stalker
profileStalker.tagline: Knows your ex's cousin's dog's name from 2018
profileStalker.description: You've mastered the art of the deep-dive. Before a first date, you've already seen their high school graduation photos, know their mom's maiden name, and have opinions about their friend group. You call it 'research.' Everyone else calls it 'concerning.' But hey, at least you'll never be surprised.

emotionalTornado.name: The Emotional Tornado
emotionalTornado.tagline: Feels ALL the feelings ALL the time
emotionalTornado.description: You don't just feel emotions—you ARE emotions. A good morning text? Euphoria. No response in 10 minutes? Despair. Someone likes your photo? True love. You're on an emotional rollercoaster, and everyone around you bought a ticket they didn't ask for. Intensity is your middle name.

chronicCanceller.name: The Chronic Canceller
chronicCanceller.tagline: 'Something came up' is your autobiography title
chronicCanceller.description: You make plans with the best intentions, then panic and cancel last minute. 'I'm not feeling well' and 'something came up' are your signature phrases. Commitment? Terrifying. Actually showing up? Even worse. You want connection, but the moment it's real, you're suddenly very busy washing your hair.

overthinkingTexter.name: The Overthinking Texter
overthinkingTexter.description: You draft, delete, redraft, and analyze every single text like it's a thesis defense. Should you use a period? Is 'haha' too cold? Does two exclamation marks seem desperate? By the time you hit send, the conversation has moved on. You're not slow—you're just battling your inner critic in real-time.

loveBomber.name: The Love Bomber
loveBomber.tagline: Says 'I love you' on date two
loveBomber.description: You fall HARD and FAST. One good conversation and you're already planning forever. You shower people with affection, grand gestures, and future plans before they've even learned your last name. It's not manipulation—it's just that your heart moves at lightning speed and your brain forgot to come along.

share.text: My biggest red flag is '{type}'! What's yours?
